basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Assistant position at AIIMS Delhi is 26th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches them before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have passed the 12th grade or an equivalent examination to be eligible for the Project Assistant role at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 30,000.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position announced in the latest recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant recruitment must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at AIIMS Delhi primarily involves a CV screening of the applications received.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at AIIMS Delhi is a contractual job, offering a fixed tenure employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any geographical restrictions for applicants. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria from any location can apply.
